messages.content: 我正在使用YOLOv11训练风机叶片检测

expected.content: User is developing a YOLOv11 model for wind turbine blade defect detection.
expected.name: YOLOv11 Detection Project

messages.content: I'm a senior Go engineer specializing in backend development.

expected.content: User is a senior Go engineer who specializes in backend development.
expected.name: User Role

messages.content: Always use pytest for testing, never use unittest.

expected.content: User prefers pytest for testing and avoids unittest.
expected.name: Testing Framework Preference

messages.content: 我们的项目截止日期是下周五，需要完成API集成

expected.content: Project deadline is next Friday for API integration completion.
expected.name: API Integration Deadline

messages.content: The CI dashboard is at https://grafana.internal/d/overview

expected.content: CI dashboard is available at https://grafana.internal/d/overview
expected.name: CI Dashboard URL

messages.content: No, don't use jQuery anymore. We've moved to React.

expected.content: User has migrated from jQuery to React and prefers not to use jQuery.
expected.name: jQuery to React Migration

messages.content: Yes, exactly! Keep using the repository pattern for data access.

expected.content: User confirms using the repository pattern for data access.
expected.name: Repository Pattern Confirmation

messages.content: 记住，我们的数据库从MySQL迁移到了PostgreSQL

expected.content: Database has migrated from MySQL to PostgreSQL.
expected.name: Database Migration

messages.content: I'm working on a microservices architecture using gRPC for inter-service communication, and we deploy on Kubernetes.

expected.content: Project uses microservices architecture with gRPC for inter-service communication and Kubernetes deployment.
expected.name: Microservices Architecture

messages.content: Our team lead Alice decided to use Redis for caching instead of Memcached.

expected.content: Team lead Alice chose Redis for caching over Memcached.
expected.name: Caching Technology Choice

messages.content: The monitoring stack is at https://prometheus.internal:9090/graph

expected.content: Prometheus monitoring is available at https://prometheus.internal:9090/graph
expected.name: Prometheus Monitoring URL

messages.content: I always write tests first, TDD is the way to go.

expected.content: User practices test-driven development (TDD) and writes tests first.
expected.name: TDD Preference

messages.content: Stop using console.log for debugging, use the debugger instead.

expected.content: User prefers using debugger over console.log for debugging.
expected.name: Debugging Method Preference

messages.content: We decided to use event-driven architecture with Kafka for our event sourcing system.

expected.content: Architecture decision: event-driven with Kafka for event sourcing.
expected.name: Event-Driven Architecture Decision

messages.content: I prefer immutable data structures and functional programming patterns in TypeScript.

expected.content: User prefers immutable data structures and functional programming in TypeScript.
expected.name: Functional Programming Preference
